purpose: Shared template for workflow factor evaluation paths.
required_structure: reuse cached factor values for raw evaluation
reuse cached factor values for split evaluation
reuse cached factor values for rolling evaluation
avoid full dataframe copy inside per-factor loop unless strictly required
preferred_patterns: pass precomputed factor series into helper functions
small local frames instead of dataset.frame.copy()
discouraged_patterns: apply_factor called repeatedly for same definition across workflow paths
split and rolling helpers recomputing factor expressions
full dataframe copy inside tight loops
acceptance_questions: Does this path reuse cached factor values?
Does this change keep backtest semantics unchanged?
Did we reduce repeated groupby/apply work?
